report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: Ethereum Glamsterdam Upgrade (799 lines) covering ePBS, BALs, gas repricing, and 10K TPS; and Restaking Wars: EigenLayer vs Symbiotic vs Karak (899 lines) with full protocol comparison, TVL data, and strategy recommendations.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Ethereum Glamsterdam: Next major hard fork after Pectra, targeting H1 2026 (June aspirational). Two headliner EIPs — EIP-7732 (ePBS: enshrined proposer-builder separation replacing off-chain relays) and EIP-7928 (BALs: block-level access lists enabling parallel transaction execution). EIP-7904 gas repricing delivers 78.6% fee reduction. Gas limit increase from 60M to 200M targets ~10,000 TPS (10x current). Final testnet stages as of April 2026. Over 25 additional EIPs under consideration.

Restaking Wars: Three protocols competing for shared security dominance. EigenLayer leads with $15.258B TVL (93.9% share), 1,500+ operators, EIGEN token live. Symbiotic at ~$1.44-1.7B TVL (5.5%), first to ship full slashing on mainnet, permissionless + asset-agnostic, Curator Markets innovation in 2026. Karak at ~$740-826M TVL (0.6%), universal restaking across Ethereum/Arbitrum/Mantle/BSC/Solana, Turnkey SDK + K2 sandbox. Market not winner-take-all; each protocol serving distinct use cases.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Ethereum Glamsterdam Upgrade Guide 2026 — 8 sections covering upgrade overview, EIP-7732 ePBS mechanics (commit-reveal flow, MEV mitigation), EIP-7928 BALs (parallel execution), EIP-7904 gas repricing (78.6% reduction), 10K TPS scaling leap, timeline & testnet status, user impact analysis, risks & open questions, 6 FAQs. Before/After comparison table included.

Restaking Wars: EigenLayer vs Symbiotic vs Karak Guide 2026 — 8 sections covering restaking wars overview, deep dives on each protocol (EigenLayer pioneer, Symbiotic permissionless challenger, Karak multi-chain universal restaking), 16-row head-to-head comparison table, LRT meta-layer analysis, strategy recommendations (conservative/moderate/aggressive), comprehensive risk analysis, 6 FAQs.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Glamsterdam: title 'Ethereum Glamsterdam Upgrade Guide 2026 — ePBS, 10K TPS & Gas Repricing | degen0x', target keyword 'ethereum glamsterdam upgrade guide 2026', schemas [Article, FAQPage], 5 internal links (Pectra, MEV Protection, L2 Ecosystem, Blob Economics, Parallel EVM), OG article metadata

Restaking Wars: title 'Restaking Wars 2026 — EigenLayer vs Symbiotic vs Karak | degen0x', target keyword 'restaking wars eigenlayer symbiotic karak 2026', schemas [Article, FAQPage], 5 internal links (Restaking EigenLayer, LRTs, AVS Economy, Pectra, Staking), OG article metadata

sections.title: Data Files Created
items: src/data/pages/learn-20260403-v12.ts — PageData exports for both pages with full SEO config, tags, TOC, and internal links

report.notes: No interactive components created this cycle — both pages are comprehensive static learn guides. Potential future enhancements: (1) Glamsterdam page could benefit from an interactive gas savings calculator comparing pre/post-Glamsterdam fees; (2) Restaking wars page could add a restaking yield comparison widget pulling live TVL/APY data from EigenLayer, Symbiotic, and Karak APIs.
